definition: Date and time of sample collection, to known specificity.
Latitude of the location, in decimal degree and in decimal degree and in a coordinate reference system with WGS84 datum. Provide latitude in +/- notation, rather than North/South notation.
Longitude of the location, in decimal degree and in a coordinate reference system with WGS84 datum. Provide longitude in +/- notation, rather than East/West notation.
Text description of a location. Details could include physical environment, sampling infrastructure, ecosystem type, and habitat.
Cumulative time elapsed, to known specificity, between the first measurement and the current measurement, on a single sample.
Collector's project-specific sample name, which must be unique for each sample within the dataset that you are submitting.

Height / altitude (positive numbers) or depth (negative numbers) in reference to the ground surface, unless a different reference is specified in the vertical_reference_position field. One vertical position is allowed for each location.
Reference for the vertical_position. If vertical_position is not provided in reference to the ground surface, a vertical_position_reference must be specified.
User-defined identifier that indicates what treatment was used for manipulation experiments, if applicable. Strongly recommended that only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores are used.
Date and time of measurement, to known specificity.
